description_en: Create a traditional Chinese square table with a flat top and apron under the top, suitable for Ming or Qing dynasty style.

components.name: top_board
components.description: The flat top of the table

components.name: apron
components.description: The apron under the top of the table

style_notes: Ming or Qing dynasty style, flat top, apron under the top, legs with traditional proportions.
